behaviors.description: The speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels so that the summary can attribute statements to specific attendees.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real STT model diarization output quality (LLM-DEP yes; MOCK-HIDE yes because stubbed labels always look correct). Rejected Integration because behavior text is about whether labels are preserved in actual transcription output, not just wiring.
behaviors.test_description: Run real audio with multiple speakers through the real STT API and assert transcript segments include correct speaker labels/turn boundaries used downstream for attendee attribution.

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text) into the summary input structure.
behaviors.justification: This targets parser logic on transcript text-to-structure transformation inside one local boundary (MOCK-MISS no). No real OS/network/subprocess and no dependence on model judgment. Rejected Integration because behavior text focuses on extraction logic itself.
behaviors.test_description: Feed representative transcript snippets into the parsing function and assert exact structured task-assignment objects (assignee, task text) are produced.

behaviors.description: The live summary output contains at least one action item for every attendee who was assigned a task during the meeting.
behaviors.justification: Pass/fail depends on real summarizer model behavior (coverage/omission of assignees), so deterministic stubs would hide real failures (LLM-DEP yes, MOCK-HIDE yes). Rejected Workflow because one model decision stage can be isolated by providing transcript/assignments directly to summarization.
behaviors.test_description: Call the real summarization model on transcripts containing known per-attendee assignments and assert output action items include at least one item for each assigned attendee.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction logic routes identified decisions into the `decisions` section schema rather than generic narrative fields.
behaviors.justification: Behavior is deterministic routing/mapping logic after decisions are already identified; failure is local transformation, not infrastructure/model quality. Rejected Integration because text specifies 'logic routes identified decisions' (single logic boundary).
behaviors.test_description: Given extracted decision objects, verify formatter/router writes them to `decisions` schema fields and not narrative fields.

behaviors.description: Key decisions mentioned in the transcript appear in the live summary's `decisions` section, not buried in the narrative.
behaviors.justification: This is model output quality/placement behavior: whether key decisions are surfaced correctly in structured output (LLM-DEP yes). Mock summaries can trivially pass and hide misses. Rejected Integration because correctness depends on real model judgment about salience and section placement.
behaviors.test_description: Use real model summarization on transcripts with known decisions and assert those decisions are present in `decisions` section and absent-as-primary-items from generic narrative.

behaviors.description: When the audio file is longer than 60 minutes, the service splits it into segments and processes them sequentially, merging the results into a single coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: Requires sequential multi-step agentic processing across segments plus merge coherence (MULTI-STEP yes). A single-step agentic/integration test misses cross-step handoff/order/state issues (integration-handoff-escalator). Rejected Agentic because behavior text explicitly requires split -> sequential processing -> merged final output.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real >60-minute recording through production segmentation flow, execute per-segment transcription/summarization in sequence, and assert final merged summary is coherent and complete across segment boundaries.

behaviors.description: The full pipeline (upload audio, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) completes without manual intervention for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: This is explicit end-to-end orchestration with multiple real agentic stages (transcribe + summarize) and delivery handoff; failures can arise only across full sequence. Rejected System because system-only would under-test model-dependent stages and multi-step agent pipeline behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Execute true end-to-end run on a real meeting file: upload, real STT call, real summarization call, and output delivery; assert successful completion and valid structured payload without manual fixes.
